name: Grammar Identifier Block
description: Identifier -> { String:(s) -> "defaultId"\n -> s ?! idChar*1.. & ~(.. + '_') } — README §Grammars. AND (9) > TERM (5) so each side of & is a full expression; ~(..+'_') has Range(nil,nil) on the left of + then '_' on the right. UNCERTAIN: the standalone '..' inside parens is just DoubleDot prefix (Range(nil,nil) per range_empty.json); confirmed.
